title: FormatInt32 — packs into 4 bytes
description: JSON + binary (de)serialization of FormatInt32 (number branded {integer:true; min:-2147483648; max:2147483647}); the 32-bit bounds select a 4-byte signed binary encoding while JSON writes the plain number.
notes: Format-aware binary width: the int32 bounds fix each value at 4 bytes (getBinaryByteSizes [4,4,4]); JSON is lossless plain-number text.
